sourcesContent:
// portfolio/client/src/data/projects.js
// Update liveUrl and githubUrl when you have your links ready.

const projects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "E-Commerce Platform",
    description: "A full-featured online store with cart, authentication, payment integration, and admin dashboard. Supports real-time inventory updates.",
    image: null, // replace with: require('../assets/project1.png')
    tech: ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Stripe", "JWT"],
    liveUrl: "#",
    githubUrl: "#",
    color: "#06b6d4",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "Task Management App",
    description: "A collaborative project management tool with drag-and-drop boards, team workspaces, real-time updates, and role-based access control.",
    image: null,
    tech: ["React", "Express", "Socket.io", "PostgreSQL", "Tailwind"],
    liveUrl: "#",
    githubUrl: "#",
    color: "#8b5cf6",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "AI Chat Assistant",
    description: "An AI-powered chat application with conversation history, markdown rendering, code highlighting, and OpenAI API integration.",
    image: null,
    tech: ["React", "Node.js", "OpenAI API", "MongoDB", "Redux"],
    liveUrl: "#",
    githubUrl: "#",
    color: "#06b6d4",
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "Social Media Dashboard",
    description: "Analytics dashboard aggregating metrics from multiple social platforms with interactive charts, scheduling, and export functionality.",
    image: null,
    tech: ["React", "Chart.js", "Node.js", "REST APIs", "CSS Grid"],
    liveUrl: "#",
    githubUrl: "#",
    color: "#8b5cf6",
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: "Blog CMS Platform",
    description: "Headless CMS with rich text editor, image uploads, SEO meta management, comment system, and RSS feed generation.",
    image: null,
    tech: ["Next.js", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Cloudinary", "MDX"],
    liveUrl: "#",
    githubUrl: "#",
    color: "#06b6d4",
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    title: "Real-time Chat App",
    description: "WhatsApp-inspired messaging app with rooms, private chats, file sharing, read receipts, and end-to-end encryption.",
    image: null,
    tech: ["React", "Socket.io", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "WebRTC"],
    liveUrl: "#",
    githubUrl: "#",
    color: "#8b5cf6",
  },
];

export default projects;
